description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com using the gitlab-ci-token and CI_BUILD_TOKEN. Define three stages: build, test, and release, and set the variables CONTAINER_NAME, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE_NAME, and CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as shown. Add a build job in the build stage that runs ash -v ./build.sh. Add a test job in the test stage that runs ash -v ./test.sh. Add a release_image job in the release stage that runs ash ./release.sh and is limited to the master branch or tags matching the regex /alpine-v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+/.
